$schema_comment: Each entry: name, module, tagline (1-line), repo (https URL), version (semver), source_crate (or null), tier (one of: foundation, encoding, hashing, format, observability, config, util, demo).

packages.name: swift-base64
packages.tagline: Sendable, Foundation-free Base64 (standard + URL-safe, padded + unpadded, constant-time).

packages.name: swift-basic-auth
packages.tagline: RFC 7617 HTTP Basic Authentication header parser + serializer — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-bearer
packages.tagline: RFC 6750 HTTP Bearer Authentication header parser + serializer + WWW-Authenticate challenge parser — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-brotli
packages.tagline: RFC 7932 Brotli codec — decoder (v0.1) + one-shot encoder (v0.2) + streaming encoder (v0.3). Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-bytes
packages.tagline: Bytes value type + reader/writer cursors — Sendable, Foundation-free; bare-swift RFC-0006.

packages.name: swift-crc
packages.tagline: CRC8/16/32/64 — generic engine + catalog (Ethernet, iSCSI, MODBUS, XMODEM, XZ, …).

packages.name: swift-cbor
packages.tagline: RFC 8949 CBOR encoder + decoder — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes for wire use.

packages.name: swift-conditional
packages.tagline: RFC 7232 ETag + If-* header parsing and § 6 precondition evaluator — Sendable, Foundation-free; depends on swift-time.

packages.name: swift-content-encoding
packages.tagline: HTTP Content-Encoding multiplexer — identity / gzip / deflate / br encode + decode. Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-cookie
packages.tagline: RFC 6265 Cookie/Set-Cookie parser and serializer — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-ddsketch
packages.tagline: DDSketch quantile sketch with relative-error guarantees — Sendable, Foundation-free; mergeable.

packages.name: swift-deflate
packages.tagline: RFC 1951 DEFLATE codec — INFLATE (v0.1+) and DEFLATE encoder (v0.2+). Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-distributed-tracing-bridge
packages.tagline: Apple swift-distributed-tracing → swift-tracing-otlp adapter with W3C TraceContext extract/inject — Sendable, bootstrap-friendly.

packages.name: swift-dotenv
packages.tagline: .env parser with ${VAR} expansion — Sendable, Foundation-free; pure function.

packages.name: swift-gzip
packages.tagline: RFC 1952 gzip codec — decoder (v0.1+) and encoder (v0.2+). Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-hdrhistogram
packages.tagline: HdrHistogram — fixed-precision-per-decade quantile structure; Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-hex
packages.tagline: Sendable, Foundation-free hex encoding (incl. constant-time).

packages.name: swift-idna
packages.tagline: Internationalized Domain Names — UTS #46 + NFC + RFC 3492 Punycode. Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-json
packages.tagline: RFC 8259 JSON parser + serializer — Sendable, Foundation-free, non-Codable.

packages.name: swift-jsonpatch
packages.tagline: RFC 6902 JSON Patch operations on swift-json — Sendable, Foundation-free, atomic apply.

packages.name: swift-jsonpath
packages.tagline: RFC 9535 JSONPath query expressions over swift-json — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-jsonpointer
packages.tagline: RFC 6901 JSON Pointer (standard + URI Fragment) — Sendable, Foundation-free, JSON-tree agnostic.

packages.name: swift-jsonschema-lite
packages.tagline: JSON Schema 2020-12 subset (type/required/properties/items/enum/const) — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-jwt-claims
packages.tagline: RFC 7519 § 4.1 registered-claim validator (exp/nbf/iat/iss/aud/sub/jti) — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-jwt-verify
packages.tagline: JWS-compact JWT verifier and signer (HS256 + ES256 + ES384 + ES512 + EdDSA, with optional kid) — wraps swift-crypto. Sendable, Foundation-free public API.

packages.name: swift-link-header
packages.tagline: RFC 8288 Link: header parser + serializer with RFC 8187 extended values — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-log-bridge
packages.tagline: Apple swift-log LogHandler that emits OTLP log records with automatic trace correlation — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-log-otlp
packages.tagline: OpenTelemetry OTLP/logs encoder over HTTP+protobuf — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes ready for HTTP POST.

packages.name: swift-metrics-bridge
packages.tagline: Apple swift-metrics MetricsFactory that emits OTLP metric records with automatic exemplar correlation — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-mime
packages.tagline: RFC 9110 media-type parser, serializer, and curated IANA catalog — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-msgpack
packages.tagline: MessagePack encoder + decoder — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes for wire use.

packages.name: swift-multipart
packages.tagline: RFC 7578 multipart/form-data parser + serializer — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-oauth2-client
packages.tagline: RFC 6749 OAuth 2.0 token-endpoint client — Sendable, Foundation-free; caller-driven HTTP transport.

packages.name: swift-otlp-exporter
packages.tagline: OpenTelemetry OTLP/metrics encoder over HTTP+protobuf — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes ready for HTTP POST.

packages.name: swift-otlp-json
packages.tagline: OTLP/HTTP/JSON encoder for traces / logs / metrics — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-prometheus
packages.tagline: Prometheus metrics + text exposition — Sendable, Foundation-free; standalone (no swift-metrics dep).

packages.name: swift-prometheus-metrics
packages.tagline: swift-metrics backend that routes to swift-prometheus — Sendable, bootstrap-friendly.

packages.name: swift-publicsuffix
packages.tagline: Mozilla Public Suffix List (PSL) longest-match lookup — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-range
packages.tagline: RFC 7233 byte-range header parser, Content-Range serializer, satisfiability helper — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-statsd
packages.tagline: StatsD wire-format encoder (Etsy + DogStatsD) — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes for UDP send.

packages.name: swift-time
packages.tagline: Foundation-free wall-clock time primitives (Instant, Duration, Calendar) + RFC 3339 / RFC 1123 parsers — Sendable.

packages.name: swift-toml
packages.tagline: TOML 1.0 parser + serializer — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-tracing-otlp
packages.tagline: OpenTelemetry OTLP/traces encoder over HTTP+protobuf — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes ready for HTTP POST.

packages.name: swift-uri
packages.tagline: WHATWG URL parser + serializer with auto-IDNA Unicode hostname encoding — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes for HTTP wire use.

packages.name: swift-uuid
packages.tagline: RFC 9562 UUIDs (v4, v7) and ULIDs — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-varint
packages.tagline: LEB128 (unsigned + signed) + ZigZag — protobuf-varint / DWARF / WASM wire-compatible.

packages.name: swift-xxhash
packages.tagline: xxHash (XXH32, XXH64, XXH3-64, XXH3-128) — Sendable, Foundation-free; xxhsum-compatible.

packages.name: swift-zlib
packages.tagline: RFC 1950 zlib codec — decoder (v0.1+) and encoder (v0.2+). Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-greet
packages.tagline: A friendly greeter — Phase 0 demo package.
